name: openmage
description: Claude Code skills for working on the OpenMage / magento-lts codebase.

plugins.name: openmage-skills
plugins.description: 27 skills covering OpenMage framework mechanics (config/EAV/layout/events/ACL/API/cron/cache/i18n), Mage_* domain modules (catalog/sales/checkout/customer/payment/shipping/tax/promotions/cms/adminhtml/product-types), and repo tooling (PHPStan level 8, Rector, PHPUnit, vendor-patches).
